hero.tagline: Building functional, interactive, and user-centric web applications.

about.name: DEFT VALIAN
about.bio: As an Information Systems student graduating in 2026, I have worked on various web projects—ranging from simple interfaces to complex transparency systems. I enjoy combining technical logic with creative problem-solving to deliver effective and interactive solutions.

description: Managed the full-cycle web development process from UI/UX design to server deployment.
Built secure and scalable backend systems using the Laravel framework and PostgreSQL databases.
Designed responsive and interactive frontend interfaces using ReactJS and Tailwind CSS.
Implemented on-page SEO strategies and website performance optimization to increase client visibility.
Actively participated in IT infrastructure maintenance and internal factory network troubleshooting.
Assisted the IT team in digitizing workflows, reporting forms, and internal management systems.
Optimized data input processes and database management using PHP frameworks and MySQL.
Collaborated with various departments to ensure systems operated without technical issues.

projects.title: Featured
projects.subtitle: A collection of applications and systems I have designed and built.
